calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Continued To Apr-14-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-14-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Susan Lee. Arnold Evje represented Plaintiff, J.J. Whelan and there being no appearance by Defendant, Tom Hollifield, the matter is taken off the settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
